title: Continuous Deployment (CD) for High-Stakes Systems
description: Architect Continuous Deployment (CD) pipelines for high-stakes systems. Implement automated canary analysis and dark launch strategies to minimize user-facing failure risk during production deployments.
objectives: Architect Continuous Deployment (CD) pipelines for high-stakes systems.
Implement automated canary analysis and dark launch strategies to minimize user-facing failure risk during production deployments.
